surface: CRM create controls for clients, contacts, products, deals, and default pipeline setup
expected: Live users without the required manage permission do not get an enabled create trigger that opens a doomed modal.
Storybook/mock mode remains usable without a live session.
Create controls are gated by the same permission family as backend mutations: clients, contacts, products, opportunities, crm pipelines, deal stages.

redEvidence.result: failed before implementation because ./permissions did not exist; CRM create triggers were not capability-aware

greenEvidence.result: passed: 18 files, 256 tests; permissions.test passed 3 tests and money.test passed 2 tests
passed: next typegen and tsc -p tsconfig.json --pretty false

notes: Vitest inside the restricted sandbox fails with esbuild spawn EPERM; commands were rerun with approved escalation for fresh evidence.
This slice gates create triggers. Existing edit/archive controls remain a separate write-permission UX hardening candidate if traversal finds them exposed to read-only CRM users.
The test run still emits the pre-existing duplicate assignment.delete warning from packages/domain/src/planning/commandReducer.ts.
